description: The DebugLinePoint component draws a line from ``LinePoint0`` to ``LinePoint1`` which is the central line. When attached, it generates 128 random Float3's which get added to ``Points``. Every point in said list have a line drawn from them to the closest point on the central line.

fields.LinePoint0: The starting point of the central line.
fields.LinePoint1: the ending point of the central line.
fields.Points: A list of points to draw lines from to the closest point on the central line.
